name: ace
description: Code Engine ACE - Intelligent pattern learning with continuous auto-search. v6.4.0: Multi-agent attribution fix + UX + hardening. Fixes subagent state-file-steal bug discovered via external benchmark validation. State-driven sessionTitle, per-agent state files, agent_id/parent_agent_id in trace payload, GAP3 self-heal, stop_hook_active check, CWD strict mode. No breaking changes. Requires: Claude Code >= 2.1.100, ace-cli >= 3.15.0.
